Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6C38 "GOGOTHEGHOST-6C38" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Gogo the Ghost.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes to default to allow joystick button in port 2 to start the game: 1. Patched the CPX $45DD instruction at $67F6 to be JMP $1500 instead 2. Added a small routine at $1500 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets X to $01, which causes the game to start just as if the RETURN key was pressed. The routine then executes the CPX $45DD as the original code did and jumps to $67F9 to carry on the normal code flow.
